description_long: This object is a large, vehicle-mounted missile launcher system, featuring a robust chassis with six wheels and four stabilizing outriggers. The main component is a rectangular missile pod angled upward, containing multiple launch tubes, each with a visible missile tip. A tall, slender antenna is mounted on one side, likely for communication or targeting purposes. The body is constructed from heavy, dark-colored metal panels, with angular surfaces and reinforced joints. The rear section includes a boxy compartment, possibly for electronics or power supply. The overall design is utilitarian and militaristic, intended for deployment in urban or field environments.
description: A heavy, vehicle-mounted missile launcher with a large angled pod, stabilizing outriggers, and a tall antenna, built from dark metal panels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the missile pod head-on, with visible launch tubes and the stabilizing outriggers spread wide.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angled missile pod, the wheels, and the tall antenna, with the rear compartment visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the missile pod and the symmetrical arrangement of the outriggers and antenna.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angled pod, wheels, and rear compartment, with missile tips visible.
